note: Combined from 3 image fragments: p155_img00 (main plot left/peak), p155_img01 (inset 0-48h), p155_img02 (extended 0-400h). Legend in p155_img03.
dose_info: single dose, dose not labeled on figure
confidence_notes: Figure split across 3 image fragments requiring cross-referencing. Peak region (0-6h) read from main plot (y up to 300 ng/mL). Mid elimination (8-48h) from inset (y up to ~120 ng/mL). Terminal phase (50-350h) from extended plot (y up to ~80 ng/mL). Points in extended plot are small and scale reconciliation introduces uncertainty. Istradefylline t1/2 ~99h from PK table on p234 supports very slow terminal decline.

note: Combined from 3 image fragments: p155_img00, p155_img01, p155_img02. Fed arm from same food effect study.
dose_info: single dose, dose not labeled on figure
confidence_notes: Same figure fragment issues as fasted curve. Fed arm shows ~1.8x higher Cmax vs fasted, consistent with typical food effect for lipophilic drugs. Peak values (260-265 ng/mL) read from main plot y-axis. Terminal phase values have higher uncertainty due to small data points in compressed extended plot.
